title: DNA Extraction Protocol for Cockroach Gut Microbiota
author: Kara Tinker
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jz5cp86

steps.title: Remove samples, usually P
steps.instruction: Remove samples, usually P. americana gut lumen stored in 100μL RNALater, from -80°C freezer and set them on ice to thaw. Remove lysozyme solution from the -20°C freezer and set it on ice to thaw. Preheat Thermomixer to 37°C.

steps.title: Remove ~50μL sample preserved in RNAlater
steps.instruction: Remove ~50μL sample preserved in RNAlater. Place aliquot in a new 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 100μL Balanced Salt Solution (2
steps.instruction: Add 100μL Balanced Salt Solution (2.5 g K2HPO4, 1 g KH2PO4, 1.6 g KCl, 1.4 g NaCl, and 10 ml of 1 M NaHCO3 per liter, pH 7.2) to the new microcentrifuge tube. Spin microcentrifuge tube 10 minutes at 5,000xg. Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Add 100μL 1xTE (10 nM Tris,...
steps.instruction: Add 100μL 1xTE (10 nM Tris, 1mM EDTA [pH 8]) and vortex to completely resuspend the pellet. Add 10μL of lysozyme solution. Incubate 30 minutes at 37°C. Add 25mg glass beads to new 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Preheat Thermomixer to 55°C
steps.instruction: Preheat Thermomixer to 55°C. Add sample to the glass beads. Vortex at maximum speed for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Let sample stand to allow the beads to settle
steps.instruction: Let sample stand to allow the beads to settle. Transfer supernatant to a new 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 100μL BTL Buffer and 20μL Proteinase K Solution
steps.instruction: Add 100μL BTL Buffer and 20μL Proteinase K Solution. Vortex to mix thoroughly.

steps.title: Incubate at 55°C, shaking at 600rpm for 60 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55°C, shaking at 600rpm for 60 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 2 minutes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 2 minutes to pellet any undigested material. Preheat Thermomixer to 65°C. Place Elution Buffer in the hybridization oven and preheat to 65°C.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube. Do not disturb the pellet.

steps.title: Add 220μL BDL Buffer to the...
steps.instruction: Add 220μL BDL Buffer to the new microcentrifuge tube with the supernatant. Vortex to mix.

steps.title: Incubate at 65°C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65°C for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add 220μL ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 220μL ethanol. Vortex for 20 seconds at maximum speed to mix thoroughly. Note: If any precipitate can be seen at this point, break the precipitate by pipetting up and down 10 times.

steps.title: Insert a HiBind DNA Mini Column...
steps.instruction: Insert a HiBind DNA Mini Column into a 2mL Collection Tube.

steps.title: Transfer the entire sample to the...
steps.instruction: Transfer the entire sample to the HiBind DNA Mini Column, including any precipitate that may have formed.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 1 minute.

steps.title: Discard the filtrate and the collection tube
steps.instruction: Discard the filtrate and the collection tube.

steps.title: Insert the HiBind DNA Mini Column...
steps.instruction: Insert the HiBind DNA Mini Column into a new 2mL Collection Tube

steps.title: Add 500μL HB Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 500μL HB Buffer.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 1 minute.

steps.title: Discard filtrate and reuse the collection tube
steps.instruction: Discard filtrate and reuse the collection tube.

steps.title: Add 700μL DNA Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 700μL DNA Wash Buffer. Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 1 minute.

steps.title: Discard the filtrate and reuse the collection tube
steps.instruction: Discard the filtrate and reuse the collection tube.

steps.title: Add 700μL DNA Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 700μL DNA Wash Buffer. Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 1 minute.

steps.title: Discard the filtrate
steps.instruction: Discard the filtrate.

steps.title: Centrifuge the empty HiBind DNA Mini...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the empty HiBind DNA Mini Column at maximum speed for 2 minutes to dry the column.

steps.title: Insert HiBind DNA Mini Column into a new nuclease-free 1
steps.instruction: Insert HiBind DNA Mini Column into a new nuclease-free 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 50μL preheated Elution Buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 50μL preheated Elution Buffer to the HiBind DNA Mini Column. Make sure to add the elution buffer to the center of the HiBind matrix.

steps.title: Incubate the HiBind DNA Column for 5 minutes at 65°C
steps.instruction: Incubate the HiBind DNA Column for 5 minutes at 65°C.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 1 minute to elute the DNA
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000xg for 1 minute to elute the DNA.

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration on the NanoDrop...
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration on the NanoDrop and store eluted DNA at -20°C.
